codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocking gap by strengthening the approve-path Playwright assertion from inferred success (control disappearance only) to explicit post-approval output evidence. The updated test now verifies that approval yields concrete visible output and keeps deterministic approve/deny safeguards, matching the follow-up feature contract and VAL-PW-006 intent.

summary: Pass. Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill procedure, and commit a13ec9110171e21ba5279a354b81e2e04c067c6c. The approve-flow test now asserts concrete completion/output evidence ('E2E approval') after Approve in addition to deterministic control-state checks, resolving the original blocking scrutiny finding without introducing regressions in the reviewed diff scope.
